text:
First, note that time zones as we know them didn’t exist in 1572.  
But for the sake of the exercise, we assume modern time zone offsets:  
Europe/Athens = UTC+2 (EET, ignoring DST for July), Asia/Singapore = UTC+8.  
Difference: UTC+8 − UTC+2 = +6 hours.  
6 PM (18:00) July 21 + 6 hours = 00:00 July 22.  

FINAL_ANSWER: 00:00 July 22
